DECLARATION OF ERIC M. SCHROEDER IN SUPPORT OF STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE (TRANSACTION ID # 100013194) (TRANSACTION ID # 100013194) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE 553386 WITH CASE 553389 IS GRANTED BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION THAT ALL PARTIES IN BOTH CASES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE CONSOLIDATION. THE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES AND THE LEAD CASE IS 553386. ALL FURTHER FILINGS MUST BE IN THE LEAD CASE ONLY. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY 24, 2107 IN CASE 553389 IS VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Stipulated Motion To Consolidate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff California Capital Insurance Company's motion to consolidate case 553386 with case 553389 is granted based on the representation that all parties in both cases have stipulated to the consolidation. The cases are consolidated for all purposes and the lead case is 553386. All further filings must be in the lead case only. The case management conference on May 24, 2107 in case 553389 is vacated. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
